rationale: The repository has no domain-expert elicitation or approval for this pilot. These are builder-authored candidate procedures derived from observable-boundary and plural-procedure design principles; they must not be described as expert-approved.

observable_boundaries: complete evidence matrix exists before final recommendation
agreement and validity evidence are explicitly distinguished
recommendation includes threshold and stop condition

sequence: declare adoption threshold and validity risks
seek evidence that could defeat adoption
complete evidence matrix for supporting and disconfirming evidence
observable_boundaries: decision threshold exists before final recommendation
disconfirming evidence is represented in the evidence matrix
recommendation includes controlled pilot and stop condition

required_validation: At least two benchmark-evaluation experts independently judge whether both routes are professionally valid.
Experts may add, merge, or reject routes and identify any ordering constraint that materially affects outcomes.
Record disagreements and do not advance expert_validity_review until adjudicated.
